title: Glitch's Resourcepack
body:
**This is the best resource pack because it has a lot of features:** **Dark mode:** Before:

After:

**Low fire:** Before:![a](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QgCTSisz/images/53a1c8d433919e712093dd07439016bf80c251e0_350.webp) After: ![a2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QgCTSisz/images/7602feccf9ee183aa1cfd2b676cef7b643661d37_350.webp) **Mini tools and items:** Before: ![a3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QgCTSisz/images/3f66bd8fada67993d7105e2292756627f449d12a_350.webp) After: ![a4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QgCTSisz/images/6c6b574c93bbe726850beb14fc7993c8cb87aa57_350.webp) **Blue netherite:** Before: ![a5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QgCTSisz/images/ac30fa848f609c167fbc59c22dee9cebbc4e553a_350.webp) After: ![a6](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QgCTSisz/images/eb4f28a210d5b7818a5e2f98b3b6f43200bb49e8_350.webp) **No end crystals, TNT, TNT minecart explosion particles:** Before: After: **Small totem popups:** Before: After: **Bow and crossbow status:** Before:

After:

**Fast grass:** Before: ![a8](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QgCTSisz/images/fb44d384f93077da8e344eb6a5b5baf54996372e_350.webp) ![a8](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QgCTSisz/images/379caf81bf0e24b53fc92b28b87da0cc6f50e7ec_350.webp) After: ![a](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QgCTSisz/images/f4be0bc5c62eed92de22012d15f1dccca6090e64_350.webp) ![a](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QgCTSisz/images/69b3fbb62e1e2cf430e775b23c4aecc079bfae98_350.webp) **Visible Ores:** Before: ![q](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QgCTSisz/images/723c7a5b1a662a5d1801912d132882b06923cf6b_350.webp) After: ![s](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QgCTSisz/images/eb948047411b8c9300b9326c84443b70d64c7df1_350.webp) **Red hits particles:** Before:
